title: Big Milk
description: This is a texture pack that makes milk buckets big. The reason why this texture pack was created is to give an advantage when knowing the person you're vs is drinking a milk bucket up in the air
body: This is a texture pack that makes milk buckets big. The reason why this texture pack was created is to give an advantage when knowing the person you're vs is drinking a milk bucket up in the air. This is meant for drain crystal pvp
